case_title: IMHOFF, ROBERT A. vs. LA PLANTE, MINDEE JO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LA PLANTE, MINDEE JO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

JUDGE:VON BEROLDINGEN CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:GALLAGHER 9:35AM: CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL IN DEPT. 7 (611). DEFENDANT IN PRO PER,STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES, RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE,STAY TO 10-6-98. IF NOT OUT,WRIT TO PROCEDD WITHOUT STAYS. IF DEFENDANT MOVES TIMELY,ALL BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES EXCEPT $185 PAID IN COURT. $2683.47 RENT AND DAMAGES IF NOT OUT TIMELY. DEFENDANT TO RETURN KEYS AND LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE,NO OTHER CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION. DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE TO BE FILED IF ALL TERMS MET.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LA PLANTE, MINDEE JO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1290 GROVE ST. #103,S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-06-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR TERMS OF STIPULATION
